title: botrychium australe
intro: Botrychium australe, also known as the Austral grapefern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Botrychium and is native to Eastern Australia and New Zealand. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium australe include treating various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Botrychium australe typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
